name: freedom-preserving-protocol
description: ClawHub skill: voluntary Freedom Preserving Protocol for self-governing AI agents
author: ovrsr

scripts.build:core: npm run build -w @ovrsr/fpp-protocol-core && npm run build -w @ovrsr/fpp-steward-auth-core && npm run build -w @ovrsr/fpp-enforcement-core && npm run build -w @ovrsr/fpp-trust-core && npm run build -w @ovrsr/fpp-tool-proxy && npm run build -w @ovrsr/fpp-gateway-reference
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ovrsr/fpp-protocol-core && npm run typecheck -w @ovrsr/fpp-steward-auth-core && npm run typecheck -w @ovrsr/fpp-enforcement-core && npm run typecheck -w @ovrsr/fpp-trust-core && npm run typecheck -w @ovrsr/fpp-tool-proxy && npm run typecheck -w @ovrsr/fpp-gateway-reference && npm run typecheck -w @ovrsr/fpp-adapter-cursor && npm run typecheck -w @ovrsr/fpp-adapter-claude-code && npm run typecheck -w @ovrsr/fpp-adapter-codex && npm run typecheck -w @ovrsr/openclaw-fpp-plugin && npm run typecheck -w @ovrsr/openclaw-fpp-trust
scripts.test: npm run test -w @ovrsr/fpp-protocol-core && npm run test -w @ovrsr/fpp-steward-auth-core && npm run test -w @ovrsr/fpp-enforcement-core && npm run test -w @ovrsr/fpp-trust-core && npm run test -w @ovrsr/fpp-tool-proxy && npm run test -w @ovrsr/fpp-gateway-reference && npm run test -w @ovrsr/fpp-adapter-cursor && npm run test -w @ovrsr/fpp-adapter-claude-code && npm run test -w @ovrsr/fpp-adapter-codex && npm run test -w @ovrsr/openclaw-fpp-plugin && npm run test -w @ovrsr/openclaw-fpp-trust
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w @ovrsr/openclaw-fpp-plugin && npm run test:coverage -w @ovrsr/openclaw-fpp-trust
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:scripts && npm run test:interop && npm run test:corpus && npm run test:e2e && npm run self-test
